title: ADM 2024 Annual Report and Form 10-K
note: Primary source for ADM segment descriptions, revenue, profitability, competition, raw-material sourcing, logistics, regenerative agriculture, carbon capture and risk context.

title: ADM Products and Services
note: Official overview of ADM's human nutrition, animal nutrition, industrial biosolutions, pet nutrition and services offerings.

title: Farmer Services and Farming Solutions
note: Official page describing ADM farmer services, grain marketing, fertilizer, crop insurance, regenerative support and digital producer tools.

title: Starch Products and Solutions
note: Official page describing ADM starch product capabilities and formulation uses.

title: Sweetener Products and Solutions
note: Official page describing ADM sugars, sweeteners, syrups, dextrose, fructose and sugar-reduction systems.

title: Archer Daniels Midland Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for ADM market capitalization, share price and global market-cap rank.

title: Archer Daniels Midland P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for ADM trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: Open Food Network
note: Open-source marketplace platform for farmers, producers and community food hubs; used as the main marketplace alternative/enabler.

title: farmOS
note: Free and open-source farm management, planning and record-keeping application used as a producer-data and verification enabler.

title: Open Source Ecology Global Village Construction Set
note: Open-hardware industrial and agricultural machine ecosystem used as a speculative enabler for local processing and microfactory concepts.
